title: chamaecrista orbiculata var. trichothyrsus
intro: Chamaecrista orbiculata var. trichothyrsus is a plant species in the legume family that is native to Africa. It is also known as 'Sutherlandia' or 'Cancer Bush', and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, boosting the immune system, and potentially aiding in cancer treatment. Chamaecrista orbiculata var. trichothyrsus can be consumed as a tea or used as a tincture, and is also available in capsule form as a dietary supplement.
